case_title: JOANNA THEIL VS. DEVOTION SPIRITS, INC.

docket_entries.description: RETURN MAIL RE: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION L.R. 18.0 ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD AS TO DEFENDANT DEVOTION SPIRITS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $95.00 SERVED JAN-24-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DEVOTION SPIRITS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF FILES THIS COLLECTION ACTION IN SMALL CLAIMS WHICH IS PRECLUDED BY CCP 116.420 (A)", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY THEIL, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT DEVOTION SPIRITS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
